---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in repository behavior, workflow automation, or published project content.
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## What happened

Explain the observed behavior, including any relevant file paths, workflow names, or pull request context.

## What you expected

Explain the expected behavior.

## Reproduction

List the steps to reproduce the issue.

## Additional context

Add logs, screenshots, or links if they help.

> Do not use this template for security reports. Follow [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) and use private vulnerability reporting.
